sizing_rule.note: Position quantity determined by optimal fixed fraction (f) applied to account equity. f is calculated from historical trade data using geometric average trade and biggest loss. Formula: GAT = G*(Biggest Loss/-f) where G=geometric mean. Requires P&L calculation (formulas 2.10a/b/c) and historical optimization before live application.

source_rule_text: Position sizing is determined by the optimal fixed fraction (f) applied to account equity, with position quantity adjusted based on the geometric average trade and biggest loss relative to the optimal f value.
